# llms.txt for how-to-scrape-liepin

## Project Overview

Liepin scraper and Chinese white-collar job data extraction API. Extract jobs with monthly CNY salaries, bonus months, recruiter data, and company profiles from liepin.com with this Apify Actor. Bilingual Chinese/English output. Free tier included.

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-liepin
- Apify Actor: https://apify.com/getascraper/liepin-scraper

## Key Features

- Extract white-collar jobs from Liepin (猎聘)
- CNY salary normalization with bonus months (13薪, 16薪)
- Bilingual field translations (Chinese to English)
- Company profiles: type, size, stage
- Experience and degree requirements
- Predictable URL extraction

## Output Format

JSON with fields: sku, productId, url, title, companyName, salaryRawText, minSalaryMonthlyCny, maxSalaryMonthlyCny, bonusMonths, annualEstimateCny, salaryDisclosed, currency, degreeRequired, companyType, experienceRequired, city, province, region, address, scrapedAt

## Technology Stack

- TypeScript
- Playwright (browser automation)
- Bilingual translations
- ESM modules

## Usage

Requires Apify account and API token. Run via Apify Console or API.

## Support

Open an issue at https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-liepin/issues
